title: Etymology
content: The word whale is derived from the Old English hwael, a creature vast and ancient beyond measure.

title: Chapter 1. Loomings
content: Call me Ishmael. Some years ago, never mind how long precisely, I thought I would sail about and see the watery part of the world.

title: Chapter 2. The Carpet-Bag
content: I stuffed a shirt or two into my old carpet-bag, tucked it under my arm, and started for Cape Horn and the Pacific.
